memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Roger Bigod, 4th Earl of Norfolk(1209-1270)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Roger Bigod (c. 1209–1270) was 4th Earl of Norfolk and Marshal of England.

Origins

He was the eldest son and heir of Hugh Bigod, 3rd Earl of Norfolk (1182-1225) by his wife Maud, a daughter of Willi …

zh.Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, Engl: 英國素福爾可特福德 聖 瑪麗 馮 雷斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Bigod於1215年出生在英國素福爾可特福德 聖 瑪麗 馮 雷斯時，他的父親Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk29歲，母親Maud Matilda Marshall23歲。他於1225年6月1日與Isabella of Scotland在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克結婚。他去世於1260年7月在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁可廷加姆享年45歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Bigod于1215年出生在英国素福爾可特福德 聖 瑪麗 馮 雷斯时，他的父亲Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk29岁，母亲Maud Matilda Marshall23岁。他于1225年6月1日与Isabella of Scotland在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克结婚。他去世于1260年7月在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁可廷加姆享年45岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Bigod was born in 1215, in Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, England, his father, Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk, was 29 and his mother, Maud Matilda Marshall, was 23. He married Isabella of Scotland on 1 June 1225, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England. He died in July 1260, in Cottingham, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Thetford, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Bigod est né en 1215, à Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Maud Matilda Marshall, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Isabella of Scotland le 1 juin 1225, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre. Il est décédé en juillet 1260, à Cottingham, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Bigod 1215 in Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk 29 und seine Mutter Maud Matilda Marshall 23. Er hat am 1. Juni 1225 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England Isabella of Scotland geheiratet. Er starb im Juli 1260 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Cottingham, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Thetford, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Bigod è nato il nel 1215 nel Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Maud Matilda Marshall, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Isabella of Scotland il 1 giugno 1225, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England. Morì nel luglio 1260, nel Cottingham, Yorkshire East Riding, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Thetford, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Bigodが1215年にイギリススフォルクスエトフォード スト マリー ス レスで生まれた時，父Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolkは29歳，母Maud Matilda Marshallは23歳であった。1225年6月1日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックでIsabella of Scotlandと結婚した。彼は1260年7月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングコッティンガムで45歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Cottingham, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 컷잉함
ko.Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, Engl: 영국 수폴크 테트퍼드 스트 메리 테 레스
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Bigod(이)가 1215년 영국 수폴크 테트퍼드 스트 메리 테 레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Matilda Marshall(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1225년 6월 1일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 Isabella of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1260년 7월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 컷잉함에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 테트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Bigod nasceu em 1215, em Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Maud Matilda Marshall, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella of Scotland em 1 de junho de 1225, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em julho de 1260, em Cottingham, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Cottingham, Yorkshire, England: коттингхам, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, Engl: тетфорд ст мэри т лесс, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Bigod родился в 1215 г. в местности тетфорд ст мэри т лесс, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Matilda Marshall, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella of Scotland 1 июня 1225 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия. Он умер июль 1260 г. в местности коттингхам, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Bigod nació en 1215, en Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Maud Matilda Marshall, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Isabella of Scotland el 1 de junio de 1225, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Murió en julio de 1260, en Cottingham, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
